html:
2026-0428
2026-05-08GACSpecial Economic Measures ActRegulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations in order to add twenty-three (23) individuals and five (5) entities to Schedule 1 of the Regulations; prohibiting them from transacting business with individuals and businesses in Canada and freezing their assets unless otherwise authorized by the Minister of the Foreign Affairs.Registration: SOR/2026-0080 Publication Date: 2026-05-20
subject: Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations
precis: Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations in order to add twenty-three (23) individuals and five (5) entities to Schedule 1 of the Regulations; prohibiting them from transacting business with individuals and businesses in Canada and freezing their assets unless otherwise authorized by the Minister of the Foreign Affairs.
